title: Bump CI actions to v5
goal: Update actions/checkout and actions/setup-node from @v4 to @v5 in .github/workflows/ci.yml so CI stops running on the soon-removed Node 20 and the deprecation warnings disappear.

steps.title: Bump checkout + setup-node to @v5
steps.detail: In .github/workflows/ci.yml change actions/checkout@v4 -> @v5 and actions/setup-node@v4 -> @v5. Leave the Node matrix (20, 22) unchanged — that is runtime, not action versions.

steps.title: Confirm no stale @v4 action refs remain
steps.detail: grep -rn '@v4' .github/ returns nothing; YAML stays syntactically valid (no broken indentation).

steps.title: Verify local build still green
steps.detail: npm run typecheck, npm test and npm run build pass locally — the action bump does not change pipeline behavior, but confirm the workflow steps still hold.

resolvedVerify: CI run is actually green on GitHub with the new action majors

autoCommit.subject: Phase 183: Bump CI actions to v5
